enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sattru Munbu?

The song conveys themes of love and emotional turmoil, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie Neethane En Ponvasantham?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's emotional struggles in love.

Who is the singer of Sattru Munbu?

The song is sung by the talented Ramya NSK, known for her soulful voice.

Who composed the music for Neethane En Ponvasantham?

The music for the film was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, renowned for his timeless melodies.

When was Sattru Munbu released?

The song was released on September 1, 2012, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sattru Munbu, the protagonist expresses deep emotional turmoil and longing for love, encapsulating the essence of romance. The song's soothing melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, complements the heartfelt lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar. As Ramya NSK's voice weaves through the poignant lines, listeners are transported into a world of love's complexities. This track serves as a beautiful reflection of the struggles and joys that come with deep emotional connections.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sattru Munbu from Neethane En Ponvasantham is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Ramya NSK's enchanting vocals and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the complexities of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this track and let it take you on a journey of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: The clouds change when I see the enemy, today love is piercing my heart.
My heart is beating, I am struck by lightning, you are the one who makes me feel alive... will you say everything is a lie? Oh...
The clouds change when I see the enemy, today love is piercing my heart.
Where am I hearing you from? Is it still the same as before?
What is the state of my heart that has been taken away? Today I am like a river that has lost its flow.
There are no friends to hold on to, my feet are lost in the chaos.
The clouds change when I see the enemy, today love is piercing my heart.
Will our words that have gone away return again? Will the colors that have faded in my eyes bloom again?
Will the moon that has been taken away grow back? Where are your hands that used to touch and speak?
The clouds change when I see the enemy, today love is piercing my heart.
My heart is beating, I am struck by lightning, you are the one who makes me feel alive... will you say everything is a lie? Oh...
The clouds change when I see the enemy, today love is piercing my heart.
